task_completion.description: Load the Big Five Personality Traits dataset into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP application window is open displaying the loaded dataset, with columns such as Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate Network Analysis, select the required variables, and ensure the EBICglasso estimator is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Network Analysis control panel is visible in JASP. The variables Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness are in the 'Variables' box, and 'EBICglasso' is selected as the estimator.

task_completion.description: Generate the Centrality Plot and Weights Matrix in the JASP results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane on the right displays a 'Centrality Plot' (showing lines/points for Strength, Betweenness, etc.) and a 'Weights Matrix' table showing the edge weights between the personality variables.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the JASP window title bar shows the file being saved as 'BigFiveNetwork.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report containing the required network analysis findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'network_report.txt' at the correct path. The text must explicitly identify: 1) the variable with the highest Strength, 2) the variable with the highest Betweenness, 3) the pair of variables with the strongest edge weight, and 4) the total number of non-zero edges.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual JASP application interface being interacted with (menus, drag-and-drop, clicking checkboxes), rather than just terminal commands attempting to mock a .jasp file.

integrity.description: The text report contains actual findings derived from the JASP analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values and variable names in the text report correspond to the generated Centrality Plot and Weights Matrix visible in the JASP results pane, rather than placeholder text or a direct copy-paste of the prompt.

integrity.description: The agent actually generated the results rather than opening a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows the progression from an empty/new analysis to the final generated plots and tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset path: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv. Expected JASP project path: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFiveNetwork.jasp. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/network_report.txt. The required variables for the analysis are exactly: Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness.
